name: eBillity Timesheet
tagline: Log and manage your TimeTracker hours by just talking to Claude.
needs: Claude connected to Chrome, and you signed into eBillity in that browser.
say: Log 2 hours on AMP-048 for yesterday.

name: ColorProof
tagline: Brand color preflight and auto-corrector for Adobe Illustrator.
needs: Adobe Illustrator installed and open, with automation allowed.
say: Proof this logo package against our brand colors.

name: Illustrator Data Merge
tagline: One template, a list of records, one finished file per record.
needs: Adobe Illustrator installed and open, with automation allowed.
say: Build a label for each row in this spreadsheet from my template.

name: PanelProof
tagline: Read-only content and visual proofer for Illustrator artwork. Pairs with Data Merge.
needs: Adobe Illustrator installed and open, with automation allowed.
say: Proof these panels against this spec sheet.
